summary: The South Bay's funding machine keeps humming: over $4 billion flowed into local startups in the past six weeks, with AI dominating the action. Nexthop AI (Santa Clara), MatX (Mountain View), and Ayar Labs (San Jose) each pulled in half-billion-dollar rounds, while robotics and healthcare plays also found backers. On the hiring front, most companies are holding steady, though seven are actively expanding headcount.
